turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. I think I was given the wrong package pricing. I was quoted 2,500 for a health check-up but my bill says 3,800.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I apologise for the confusion. Could I have your name and invoice number to look into this?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Checking... I can see the 3,800 includes a few additional tests that were added during your visit — an ECG and a blood sugar test — which were not in the basic package.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Oh. The doctor suggested those. I didn't realise they were extra.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Completely understandable. The additional tests were medically recommended during the visit, which is why they were charged separately. I can have our billing team send you a detailed itemised bill if that helps clarify?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Done — itemised bill sent to your registered email. Sorry for the confusion, Urmila ji.
